Socialtrait One-pager 2026-07-07 Internal

Simulated audiences cut campaign risk before a dollar is spent

Q3 pilot results for Socialtrait audience simulation across three enterprise campaigns. We are asking for approval to expand the pilot to ten accounts.

Prediction accuracy
87%
12pt vs. panel baseline
Time to insight
4hrs
was 3 weeks with panels
Cost per study
$1.2k
−94% vs. field research
Pilot campaigns
3
CPG · fintech · retail

01What we learned

Simulation flagged the failing creative in every pilot

In all three pilots, the simulated audience ranked creative variants in the same order as the eventual in-market results. The CPG campaign's weakest variant — which the client planned to lead with — was flagged by simulated Gen-Z personas within four hours, saving an estimated $340k in media spend.

Panel agreement held across segments: the model's confidence intervals contained the observed lift in 11 of 12 measured cells.

Pilots
Arlo Foods, Northbeam, Reva
Segments
12 audience cells
Window
2026-04 → 2026-06
Method
Simulated panel n=2,400/study

02Expansion plan

Ten accounts, one quarter, same instrumentation

PhaseAccountsStudiesBudget
Jul — onboard4 existing pipeline8$14k
Aug — scale4 new logos12$21k
Sep — validate2 enterprise6$18k
The ask Approve $53k expansion budget and one forward-deployed engineer by July 18 so the ten-account pilot completes before Q4 planning.
